activePeriods.description: Active period governed by Vimshottari lords: Jupiter and Mercury.

natalRulesEvaluations.name: Cuspal Sub Lord of 7th House for Marriage Timing
natalRulesEvaluations.reasoning: The 7th Cuspal Sub Lord (Saturn) is in the star of Rahu, which signifies houses []. The linkage is mixed/neutral, suggesting that partnerships will trigger growth and require conscious alignment.

natalRulesEvaluations.name: 10th Cuspal Sub Lord for Career and Profession Sector
natalRulesEvaluations.reasoning: The 10th Cuspal Sub Lord (Mercury) is in the star of Moon, which signifies houses []. Standard career promise; suggests career advancement will occur steadily through discipline.

natalRulesEvaluations.name: Financial Status & Wealth Promise via 2nd Cuspal Sub Lord
natalRulesEvaluations.reasoning: The 2nd Cuspal Sub Lord (Rahu) resides in the star of Ketu, signifying houses []. Requires careful financial budgeting and prudent cash-flow planning.

natalRulesEvaluations.name: Health and Disease Propensity via 1st and 6th CSL
natalRulesEvaluations.reasoning: The 6th Cuspal Sub Lord (Jupiter) is in the star of Mercury, signifying houses []. Auspicious: Low susceptibility to chronic ailments, strong natural immunity.

natalRulesEvaluations.name: Dasha-Bhukti-Antara (DBA) Event Trigger Validation
natalRulesEvaluations.reasoning: Current major active timeline lords are Mahadasha: Jupiter and Bhukti: Mercury. These planetary nodes are ripe to trigger events in their designated houses.

triggeredTransitEvents.name: Daily Muhurta Alignment
triggeredTransitEvents.description: Daily alignment evaluated successfully under the active planetary energies of Mahadasha lord: Jupiter and Bhukti lord: Mercury.
